name: IT Password Reset
subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] Your password expires in 24 hours
description: Impersonates the IT helpdesk urging employees to reset their expiring password via a fake portal link.

name: HR Policy Update
subject: Important: Updated Employee Policy — Sign by Friday
description: Mimics an urgent HR policy notice requiring employees to review and sign a document before a deadline.

name: Microsoft 365 Suspension
subject: Your Microsoft account has been suspended
description: Highly convincing Microsoft branding impersonation claiming account suspension to steal Office 365 credentials.

name: CEO Wire Transfer
subject: Confidential: Urgent Wire Transfer Required
description: Business Email Compromise style attack impersonating the CEO to trick finance staff into transferring funds.

name: Package Delivery Alert
subject: Your package could not be delivered — action needed
description: Fake delivery notification from a spoofed courier requesting payment or personal info to reschedule delivery.

name: LinkedIn Connection
subject: You have 3 new connection requests waiting
description: Spoofs a LinkedIn notification about pending connection requests to lure employees into entering credentials.
